== Notes for [[Item:Q87494|Q87494]] ==

[https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lucius_Caecilius_Metellus_Calvus Wikipedia - Lucius Caecilius Metellus Calvus]

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
66F2940BD8A371EFBBE49822EF79916C902A
geni:6000000003828196721

[[Category:Possibly derived from wikipedia]]
[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
